versions.version_description: Complete chords and lyrics / different approach, sticks to basic chords / short tabs for guitar riff.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Transpose +1 steps with buttons on the left for original key, or capo up 1, (or 
leave like this to sing with baritones!). Ask if you want chord fingering help.

Note, the live version requires +2 steps

Intro:  ([ch]D[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]/[ch]D[/ch]) x8

[tab][ch]D[/ch]             [ch]Am/D[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Am/D[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]Am/D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]Am/D[/ch]
You want a love, to last forever?  one that will never, fade away[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                [ch]Am/D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]Am/D[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Am/D[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Am/D[/ch]
I want to help you, with your problem, stick around,  I say[/tab]

[tab]      [ch]GM7[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]CM7[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch]  [ch]Fdim[/ch]  [ch]D/F#[/ch]
Coming up           coming up,     yeah[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]GM7[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch]         [ch]Bm7[/ch]  [ch]CM7[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]Fdim[/ch]  [ch]D/F#[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Am/D[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Am/D[/ch]
It's coming up,    like a flower,  coming up,   I say,  wooo[/tab]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]              [ch]Am/D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]Am/D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]Am/D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Am/D[/ch]
You want a friend, you can rely on, one who will never, fade away[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]Am/D[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Am/D[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Am/D[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Am/D[/ch]
And if you're searching for an answer, stick around,  I say[/tab]

[tab]      [ch]GM7[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]CM7[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch]  [ch]Fdim[/ch]  [ch]D/F#[/ch]
Coming up,         coming up[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]GM7[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch]         [ch]Bm7[/ch]  [ch]CM7[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]Fdim[/ch]  [ch]D/F#[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Am/D[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Am/D[/ch]
Coming up,    like a flower, coming up,    yeah[/tab]

Solo: [ch]G7[/ch]  ([ch]D[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]/D) x4

[tab][ch]D[/ch]              [ch]Am/D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]Am/D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]Am/D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]Am/D[/ch]
You want some peace, and understanding, so everybody,  can be free[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]           [ch]Am/D[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]Am/D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]Am/D[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Am/D[/ch]
I know that we can get together,  we can make it, stick with me[/tab]

[tab]            [ch]GM7[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]CM7[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch]  [ch]Fdim[/ch]  [ch]D/F#[/ch]
It's coming up,           coming up[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]GM7[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch]        [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]CM7[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch]         [ch]Fdim[/ch] [ch]D/F#[/ch]
Coming up,    like a flower,  coming up,   for you and me[/tab]

Solo: ([ch]D[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]/[ch]D[/ch]) x4   [ch]G7[/ch]  ([ch]D[/ch] [ch]Am/D[/ch]) x6

[tab]       [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Am/D[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Am/D[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Am/D[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Am/D[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Am/D[/ch]
Coming up,           coming up[/tab]

[tab]       [ch]GM7[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]CM7[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch]  [ch]Fdim[/ch]  [ch]D/F#[/ch]
Coming up,             coming up     I say[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]GM7[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch]        [ch]Bm7[/ch]  [ch]CM7[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch]  [ch]Fdim[/ch] [ch]D/F#[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Am/D[/ch] ([ch]D[/ch] [ch]Am/D[/ch]) x4
Coming up,   like a flower, coming up,              I feel it in my bones[/tab]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]                         [ch]Am/D[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]Am/D[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Am/D[/ch]
You want a better kind of future, one that everyone can share[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]             [ch]Am/D[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Am/D[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]Am/D[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]Am/D[/ch]
You're not alone, we all could use it, stick around, we're nearly there[/tab]

[tab]       [ch]GM7[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]CM7[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch]      [ch]Fdim[/ch] [ch]D/F#[/ch]

[tab]       [ch]GM7[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch]         [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]CM7[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch]         [ch]Fdim[/ch]  [ch]D/F#[/ch]

[tab]       [ch]GM7[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]CM7[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch]   [ch]Fdim[/ch] [ch]D/F#[/ch]
